message:
feat(hook): add explain hint to block messages (oien.2.3)

Add a copy-paste friendly "Tip: dcg explain "<cmd>"" hint to block output:
- Shows after allow-once code (when present) but before verbose box
- Appears in both TTY (stderr) and JSON (stdout) outputs
- Properly escapes double quotes in commands for safe copy-paste

Tests:
- format_explain_hint: basic format, quote escaping, special chars
- format_denial_message: hint presence and positioning
- print_colorful_warning: no-panic with various inputs

Closes: git_safety_guard-oien.2.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
